mainEntity.name: How much does commercial cleaning cost in Las Vegas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most small office and retail spaces in Las Vegas run $150 to $350 per recurring visit, depending on square footage and frequency. Restaurants and larger spaces are quoted on walkthrough. Recurring clients always get a better rate than one-time service.

mainEntity.name: Can you clean after business hours?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Most of our office and retail clients are cleaned after close or before open. We have a key-and-alarm protocol and can work around your schedule.

mainEntity.name: Do I have to sign a long-term contract?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Our commercial agreements are month-to-month. You can pause or cancel with 30 days' notice — no auto-renewals, no cancellation fees.
Yes. Every team member is background-checked and trained on our process. We carry full liability insurance and a janitorial bond.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle restaurant kitchen cleaning?

acceptedAnswer.text: We clean dining rooms, restrooms, glass, and front-of-house. Kitchen hood and exhaust cleaning is a specialized trade — we partner with local hood-cleaning specialists and can refer you.
